title: Gluten-Free Buneña
description: A nutty, silky, romantic Argentinian dish featuring a gluten-free bun topped with grilled nuts and honey for a delicious snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Coarse Salt
ingredients.notes: kosher or sea salt, for topping the nuts

instructions: Lightly toast the almonds and hazelnuts in a dry skillet over medium heat, stirring frequently.
While the nuts are toasting, prepare the honey by mixing it with a little bit of water until smooth. You can also use maple syrup as an alternative if preferred.
Once the nuts are cooled slightly but still warm from toasting, drizzle them gently with the honey mixture.
Add a sprinkle of coarse salt on top of each toasted nut layer for a pop of flavor.
Place the prepared bun in the oven and bake for 5 minutes. Remove it when you can smell the sweet aroma of the nuts combined with the honey.
Serve immediately, allowing the flavors to meld together beautifully.
